## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests (or justified why not)
- [ ] Ran `make ci` locally
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior or usage changed
- [ ] Considered security and safety implications (tool access, side effects, secrets)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered (if applicable)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything you want reviewers to focus on (tradeoffs, follow-ups, risks).
